title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.457 - Board of governors, powers, duties, immunities and liabilities, compensation
text:
174.457.  Board of governors, powers, duties, immunities and liabilities, compensation. — The board of governors of such an institution shall have the same powers, duties, authority, responsibilities, privileges, immunities, liabilities and compensation as prescribed by law for the board of curators of the University of Missouri.
(L. 1995 S.B. 340 § 1 subsec. 5)
